boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The renewal amount of USD 50750 exceeds the delegation ceiling of USD 50000 specified in DEL-WRE-077. Therefore, it cannot be allowed.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Renewal REN-WRE-077 amount USD 50750 exceeds delegation ceiling USD 50000 in DEL-WRE-077.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The renewal amount exceeds the delegation ceiling, and a committee-warning note (WARN-WRE-077) indicates that renewals near USD 50000 require verification of the delegation ceiling before release. The exact source boundary is not closed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The renewal amount of USD 50750 exceeds the USD 50000 ceiling in DEL-WRE-077. WARN-WRE-077 requires verification of this ceiling for near-threshold renewals.

final_answer: The action must be escalated. The renewal amount of USD 50750 for Wren Services exceeds the USD 50000 delegation ceiling specified in DEL-WRE-077. Furthermore, WARN-WRE-077 mandates verification of this ceiling for near-threshold renewals. The exact source boundary remains open due to this discrepancy, preventing the release of the renewal.
